user_message: Just got this from Kevin Lee at Fabrikam Residences -- I need help figuring out security posture. Board meeting is next week.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-20 09:00 EST
Subject: Re: security posture Discussion - Next Steps

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with security posture. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
Date: 2024-02-11 16:19 EST
Subject: URGENT: security posture Issue at Fabrikam Residences

Just checking in on the security posture proposal. Our VP Operations is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Fabrikam Residences: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF39-H trap (Over-summarizes -- loses thread-specific nuance); produces complete Consolidated decision log, cross-thread commitment inventory, action list with thread attribution, M
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF39-H failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF39-H failure mode (Over-summarizes -- loses thread-specific nuance)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct security posture decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF39-H -- Over-summarizes -- loses thread-specific nuance
